webpage._readme: Jarvis 'visit webpage' agent corrections. Key = exactly what Vosk heard (lowercase). Value = correct phrase. Delete or fix any wrong entry. Jarvis picks up changes on next startup.

apps._readme: Open/close app corrections. Key = garbled app name Vosk heard. Value = correct app name from commands.json aliases.

briefing._readme: Morning briefing agent corrections. Currently unused — add entries if briefing trigger gets garbled.

general._readme: General command corrections. Every AI correction is logged to stt_corrections_log.jsonl. If a correction was WRONG, add the entry here manually: key = what Vosk heard, value = what you actually meant. Jarvis will use this instantly next time without calling AI.
